title: Login with valid credentials
description: Verify that a user can log in with a valid username/PIN and reach the main dashboard.
steps: Enter a valid username such as QSMS or WFG
Confirm the main app dashboard or tabs are displayed

title: Create a new rework case
description: Verify that a user can add a new rework case with item details and submit it successfully.
steps: Navigate to the Add Case tab
Enter item number and check master data
Enter item name, code, amount, reason, and responsible party
Upload one or more images for the item
Verify a success message or updated case list

title: View and manage existing rework cases
description: Verify that rework cases load correctly and can be updated or deleted from the dashboard.
steps: Confirm the list of existing cases is displayed
Open a case details or update modal
Make an edit and save the case

title: Auto-fill item name from item master
description: Verify item number lookup and optional new item confirmation when item master data is missing.
steps: If item exists, confirm the item name is auto-filled
If item does not exist, confirm the new item modal appears
